title: When Date has Passed (# of days) > Move Item to Group

posts.author: Jaewoo (Jaewoo Kim)
posts.cookedHtml:
I set up an automation where when an item is marked as completed, i apply the current date as completed date and move the item to the completed group.

Request:
I would like another automation, where after a # of days has passed since completed, that same item be moved to a completed some time ago group.

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jaewoo,

This is definitely possible within monday automations.

When you move the item to the completed group you would just need to set another date column to be x days after today.

You can then use the ‘When date arrives, move item to group’ automation to move it to your next group.

This will allow your workflow to function correctly.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml: You might want to try this automation…

posts.author: Downing510 (Matt Downing)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to use your recommended automation, but the “after some time” automation option dies not appear for me. Is there a trick to using that automaton?
